name: Eight-Trick Butter Cookies
recipeIngredient: 2 1/2 cups sifted Pillsbury's Best All Purpose Flour
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. Sift together flour, soda, cream of tartar, and salt. Set aside.
3. Cream the butter until smooth.
4. Gradually add sugar, creaming well. Blend in egg and vanilla; beat well.
5. Add the dry ingredients gradually; mix well.
6. Drop by half teaspoonfuls onto ungreased baking sheets.
7. Top with candied cherry halves or walnut halves (or shape as directed in following variations).
For use with Pillsbury's Best Self-Rising Flour, omit soda, cream of tartar, and salt.
Variations:
1. Snowballs: Stir in 1 1/2 cups chopped Funsten's Walnuts. Chill dough. Shape by teaspoonfuls into balls. Roll warm cookies in confectioners' sugar. Cool, roll again in sugar.
2. Butter Fingers: Stir in 1 cup chopped Funsten's Nuts, 1/2 cup chopped well-drained maraschino cherries. Chill dough. Shape by teaspoonfuls into oblong finger cookies. Bake 8 to 12 minutes. Roll warm cookies in sugar. Cool, roll again in sugar.
3. Jewel Clusters: Blend in grated orange rind, orange juice, mixed candied fruit, and chopped Funsten's Nuts. Drop by half teaspoonfuls onto ungreased baking sheets.
4. Cinnamon Balls: Chill dough. Shape by teaspoonfuls into balls, then roll in a mixture of 1/4 cup sugar and 2 teaspoons French's Cinnamon.
5. Butter Crispies (rolled cookie): Chill dough. Roll out on well-floured surface to 1/8-inch thickness. Cut into desired shapes with floured cutters.
6. Butter Thinsies (refrigerator cookie): Chill dough. Shape into rolls, 2 inches in diameter. Wrap in waxed paper; chill at least 2 hours. Cut into 1/8-inch slices. If desired, sprinkle with chopped coconut or Funsten's Nuts. Bake 6 to 8 minutes.
7. Chocolate Mint Creams: Stir in 2 squares (2 ounces) melted unsweetened chocolate. Chill dough. Shape into rolls, 2 inches in diameter. Wrap in waxed paper; chill at least 2 hours. Cut into 1/8-inch slices. Bake 6 to 8 minutes. Cool. Spread half of cookies with Peppermint Frosting. Top with remaining cookies.
8. Molasses Spice Crisps: Stir in 1/4 cup molasses, 2 teaspoons French's Cinnamon, 1 teaspoon French's Ginger, and 1/2 teaspoon French's Nutmeg. Chill dough. Roll out on well-floured surface to 1/8-inch thickness. Cut into desired shapes with floured cookie cutters. Bake 6 to 8 minutes.
